HESP602 Advanced Seminar in Neurological Bases of Communication (2 Credits)

An advanced discussion of the neural bases of human communication and its disorders, neuroimaging, neural plasticity and neurological evaluations, with emphasis on current developments and critical analysis. Prerequisite: An undergraduate course in human neuroanatomy. Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Hearing & Speech Sciences department.
